TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jim_Ard, title = Jim_Ard, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jim_Ard} }

S.FORM: Jim Ard sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1948, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 9, Jim Ard, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jim Ard sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1948, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 9, Jim Ard, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *im ar* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *im ar*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
